body.title: Rename /audit → /day-close-audit (debris check, not review)
body.result: Renamed across ~/.claude/skills/ (dir mv + SKILL.md frontmatter), CLAUDE.md, lab/claudecode/cc_skills/*, lab/design_docs/*, wild_igor/igor/network/proxy.py, daemon_supervisor.py, tools/metrics.py, slate_manager.py, cc_memory_seed/MEMORY.md, and ClaudeAndAkien repo (skills/audit.md → day-close-audit.md + README.md). TheIgors commit bf86a1cb; ClaudeAndAkien commit ee46e83. Historical files (papers/, sessions.md, *.dsb) left alone.
body.description:
Current /audit is mostly about not leaving debris (temp files, leaked runtime state, dead code) and is invoked during /day-close. /review is the one actually reviewing plans/code/diffs. Renaming clarifies roles.

## Changes
- mv ~/.claude/skills/audit/ ~/.claude/skills/day-close-audit/
- Update SKILL.md frontmatter name + description
- Update ~/.claude/skills/day-close/SKILL.md to reference /day-close-audit
- Grep TheIgors repo for '/audit' references that mean the debris check (vs /review); update those

## Not in scope
- Changing what /audit does — just the name.
- Changing /review — separate ticket.
